fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the business unit in the consolidation process.

fields.name: Average Exchange Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the average exchange rate of the business unit.

fields.name: Closing Exchange Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the closing exchange rate of the business unit.

fields.name: Last Closing Exchange Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last closing exchange rate considered when adjusting balances in re-runs for this business unit.

fields.name: Currency Exchange Rate Table
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency exchange rate table of the business unit.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the consolidation.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the consolidation.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the business unit.
